description_long: This is a vintage-style corded telephone with a pastel pink color scheme, featuring a classic rotary dial on the front. The handset is robust and ergonomically curved, resting securely on a cradle atop the rectangular base. A coiled cord connects the handset to the base, adding to its retro aesthetic and functional design. The rotary dial is detailed with finger holes and a central label area, typical of mid-20th-century telephones. The base is broad and stable, with slightly flared sides and a flat bottom, ensuring it remains stationary on flat surfaces. The overall appearance is both decorative and functional, evoking a sense of nostalgia and domestic comfort.
description: A pastel pink vintage corded telephone with a rotary dial, coiled cord, and a sturdy rectangular base. The handset rests on a cradle, giving it a classic and nostalgic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, cradle, and coiled cord prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handset and the rotary dial's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handset, the cradle, and the coiled cord trailing away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the coiled cord extending outward and the rotary dial partially visible.
